title: Blade Runner 2049
logline: A young blade runner's discovery of a long-buried secret leads him to track down former blade runner Rick Deckard, who's been missing for thirty years, while questioning his own identity and memories.
antagonistOrConflict: Wallace Corporation and the existential question of K's identity/humanity
themes: Identity and what makes us human

actBreaks.description: K discovers the wooden horse that matches his childhood memory, confirming his suspicion that he might be the miracle child.

validation.ruling: Scene 42 shows the market setting where K transitions from his official investigation into the underground world, marking the end of Act 1 as he moves from following orders to pursuing personal truth.

actBreaks.description: Joshi is killed by Luv, eliminating K's protection and forcing him into direct confrontation with Wallace Corp.

validation.ruling: Scene 129 shows Luv confronting and killing Joshi in her office, marking the irreversible point where K's protection is eliminated and he becomes a fugitive, fundamentally changing the story's direction into the final act.

naturalStructure.structuralPersonality: This is a detective story wrapped in existential philosophy, structured as a classic three-act investigation that becomes increasingly personal. The first act establishes K as a dutiful blade runner who discovers evidence of replicant reproduction. The second act transforms into a quest for identity as K believes he's the miracle child, leading him through memory labs and orphanages to find Deckard. The final act strips away illusions—K learns he's not the chosen one but chooses to act heroically anyway. The structure mirrors the original Blade Runner's noir detective format but inverts it: instead of hunting a replicant, our replicant protagonist hunts for his own humanity.
naturalStructure.pacingNotes: The script maintains deliberate pacing with short, atmospheric scenes averaging 1.2 pages. The Vegas sequence (scenes 112-141) provides the longest sustained location, allowing character development between K and Deckard. The climactic sea wall battle (scenes 152-162) uses rapid-fire scene cuts to build intensity, contrasting with the contemplative final scenes at the memory lab.

incitingIncident.description: A technician examines bones from the footlocker, revealing they belong to a female replicant who died in childbirth 30 years ago.
incitingIncident.sceneHeading: INT. MORGUE. POLICE STATION. MOMENTS LATER.

validation.ruling: Scene 29 reveals the discovery of female replicant bones with evidence of death during childbirth, shattering the established world order that replicants cannot reproduce and forcing K into the central investigation that drives the entire plot.

midpoint.description: K meets Dr. Ana Stelline in her memory lab, separated by glass due to her compromised immune system, and she examines his wooden horse, confirming the memory is real but impossible since memories aren't shared.

validation.ruling: Scene 98 shows K meeting Ana Stelline in her memory lab, where he will soon discover his cherished childhood memory is implanted, representing the crucial revelation that transforms his understanding of his identity and shifts him from reactive investigation to proactive search for truth.

climax.description: Luv surfaces to taunt the drowning Deckard when K rises behind her, grabs her throat, and holds her underwater as she fights back.

validation.ruling: Scene 158 is merely Deckard struggling underwater, but Scene 159 delivers the true climax where K rises behind Luv, grabs her throat, and holds her underwater in the final life-or-death confrontation that resolves the main conflict and demonstrates K's character arc completion.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES OVER GROUND. DAY.
scenes.summary: The camera soars over an infinite artificial landscape of abandoned solar panels and plastic sheeting.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMLAND. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: The view reveals dry, inhospitable California farmland as a beaten Spinner aircraft flies across the barren landscape.

scenes.heading: INT. SPINNER.
scenes.summary: K, the sleeping pilot, wakes to a chime and sees plastic greenhouses ahead, his eyes hardening at a strange installation.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMLAND. CALIFORNIA. DAY.
scenes.summary: The Spinner travels over abandoned greenhouses and plastic domes, approaching a creaking windmill.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE. DAY.
scenes.summary: The Spinner approaches a cement farmhouse with corrugated tin roof beside a plastic tented pool.

scenes.heading: INT. TENTED POOL. DAY.
scenes.summary: A protective-gear-clad Farmer works in a pool of sludge, harvesting nematodes, and looks up as the Spinner passes overhead.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE.
scenes.summary: K emerges from his landed Spinner, sends out a Pilotfish drone, and approaches the farmhouse past a dead tree.

scenes.heading: INT. FARMHOUSE. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: K explores the clean but sparse farmhouse interior, examining sheet music, an aquarium, and a simmering pot when heavy footsteps approach.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE. CONTINUOUS.
scenes.summary: The Farmer, revealed as Sapper Morton, removes his protective gear and decontaminates outside his home, eyeing K's Spinner.

scenes.heading: INT. FARMHOUSE. CONTINUOUS
scenes.summary: Sapper enters and confronts K about his unannounced visit, with K revealing he's police and questioning Sapper about his farming operation.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: K emerges from the farmhouse holding Sapper's glasses and a case containing Sapper's eye, instructing the Pilotfish to photograph everything.
scenes.turningPointNote: K has clearly killed Sapper Morton and extracted his eye for identification, establishing K as a Blade Runner who retires replicants

scenes.heading: INT. SPINNER.
scenes.summary: K contacts Lt. Joshi via his Spinner's communication system, showing her Sapper's eye for identification scanning.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE.
scenes.summary: K finds a cowslip by the tree and uses the Pilotfish to scan underground, discovering a buried footlocker beneath the roots.
scenes.turningPointNote: The discovery of the buried footlocker sets up the central mystery that will drive the plot forward

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K's Spinner flies through the dystopian Los Angeles skyline during a lightning storm at night.

scenes.heading: INT. POLICE STATION. PROCESSING HALL. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K walks through the crowded police station processing hall where human cops call him derogatory names.

scenes.heading: INT. INTERVIEW ROOM. DAY.
scenes.summary: K undergoes a psychological evaluation test, responding to prompts about cells and being interlinked while a camera focuses on him.

scenes.heading: EXT. CITY STREET.
scenes.summary: K walks through snowy city streets carrying a newly purchased package.

scenes.heading: EXT. K’S APARTMENT COMPLEX
scenes.summary: K enters his apartment complex, a converted office building.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT COMPLEX.
scenes.summary: K moves through the densely crowded building filled with poor residents of various ethnicities who acknowledge him with foreign epithets.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT COMPLEX. CONTINUED.
scenes.summary: K climbs 80 stories of stairs, encountering an old woman and other residents who show no gladness at seeing a Replicant.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY.
scenes.summary: K walks past his neighbors' open doors filled with families and shops, entering his own apartment marked with anti-replicant graffiti.

scenes.heading: EXT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: A light turns on in K's apartment window.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT.
scenes.summary: K enters his sparse apartment, hides his package, and turns on music while examining his torn coat and shoulder wound.

scenes.heading: INT. SHOWER.
scenes.summary: K washes off dust and blood in a brief five-second shower.

scenes.heading: INT. BATHROOM.
scenes.summary: K treats his shoulder wound with platelet jelly while conversing with the unseen Joi about his day.

scenes.heading: INT. KITCHEN.
scenes.summary: K cooks a prefab meal in his corridor kitchen while continuing his conversation with Joi about his ruined shirt.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT.
scenes.summary: K pours two drinks and eats alone while Joi, revealed as a holographic digital companion, prepares a meal and discusses music trivia.
scenes.turningPointNote: The revelation that Joi is a holographic AI companion rather than a real woman establishes K's isolation and the nature of relationships in this world

scenes.heading: EXT. ROOFTOP. STORMING. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: On the rooftop during a storm, Joi experiences rain passing through her projection while telling K he looks like her in the lightning.

scenes.heading: INT. MORGUE. POLICE STATION. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: A technician examines bones from the footlocker, revealing they belong to a female replicant who died in childbirth 30 years ago.
scenes.turningPointNote: The discovery that a replicant gave birth shatters the fundamental understanding of replicant biology and threatens the social order

scenes.heading: INT. JOSHI’S OFFICE. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: Joshi, shaken by the revelation, declares that the discovery of replicant reproduction must be covered up to prevent war.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER. DAY.
scenes.summary: K's Spinner flies past advertisements for Joi digital companions featuring the Wallace logo.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER. DAY.
scenes.summary: K's Spinner approaches the massive Wallace Towers that have overshadowed the old Tyrell Corporation pyramids.

scenes.heading: EXT. WALLACE TOWER.
scenes.summary: K's Spinner approaches the foot of the great Wallace Towers.

scenes.heading: INT. LOBBY. WALLACE CORP. DAY.
scenes.summary: A greeter escorts K through the tomb-like lobby of Wallace Corporation.

scenes.heading: INT. ENTRY. RECORDS LIBRARY. DAY.
scenes.summary: K meets with a File Clerk to check on an old serial number, providing hair for DNA scanning.

scenes.heading: INT. LUV’S OFFICE. THAT MOMENT.
scenes.summary: Luv, a Wallace Corporation employee, conducts a business meeting via hologram while K's inquiry triggers her system.

scenes.heading: INT. RECORDS LIBRARY. THAT MOMENT.
scenes.summary: The File Clerk leads K through the records library, discussing the Blackout that wiped digital data, and locates a relevant file card.

scenes.heading: INT. NEXUS RELIQUARY HALL. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: Luv leads K past display cases containing dead replicants while discussing Wallace's contribution to off-world colonization.

scenes.heading: INT. SMALL BASEMENT CORRIDOR.
scenes.summary: Luv and K walk through a basement corridor where she asks about his Joi companion and forces open a stuck door with her bare hands.

scenes.heading: INT. MEMORY VAULT.
scenes.summary: In the subzero memory vault, Luv shows K damaged memory bearings and plays a Voight-Kampff test recording featuring Deckard and a green-eyed subject.
scenes.turningPointNote: The discovery of Deckard's connection to the case and the green-eyed replicant provides a crucial lead in the investigation

scenes.heading: INT. HOME FOR THE ELDERLY. DAY ROOM. DAY.
scenes.summary: K questions Gaff at an elderly home about Deckard, learning that Deckard worked alone and has since retired.

scenes.heading: EXT. MARKET. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K observes the busy market with its vending machines and diverse crowd of customers.

scenes.heading: EXT. BIBI’S BAR. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Outside Bibi's Bar, a sex establishment, a Handler spots K and signals to her doxies.

scenes.heading: EXT. MARKET. UNDER CANOPY.
scenes.summary: Three doxies approach K at his table where he studies photos from Sapper's farm, with Mariette staying after the others leave disgusted upon recognizing him as a Blade Runner.

scenes.heading: EXT. SAPPER’S FARMHOUSE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Evidence of the dig is visible near Sapper's farmhouse at dawn.

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K searches the farmhouse piano and discovers a hidden tobacco tin containing a photo of a woman with a baby and a baby's sock.
scenes.turningPointNote: The discovery of the photo and baby's sock provides concrete evidence of the replicant child and advances K's investigation

scenes.heading: EXT. FARMHOUSE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K finds a date carved on the tree root like a grave marker and is visibly shaken by the discovery.
scenes.turningPointNote: The carved date appears to match K's own memories, suggesting a personal connection to the mystery

scenes.heading: INT. STAIRS. WALLACE TOWER. DAY.
scenes.summary: Luv climbs marble stairs in Wallace Tower.

scenes.heading: INT. PRIVATE OFFICE. WALLACE TOWER. DAY.
scenes.summary: Luv enters Wallace's temple-like office with its koi pond and reports on the new replicant model while Wallace's voice echoes from everywhere.

scenes.heading: INT. CRECHE.
scenes.summary: A nude female replicant awakens for the first time in a dark room as Wallace touches and examines her face.

scenes.heading: INT. CRECHE. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: Wallace sits on a stool cleaning his hands while a new Replicant sits wrapped in a sheet, and he asks Luv to bring him instruments for examination.

scenes.heading: INT. CRECHE. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: Wallace examines the Replicant model with flying probes while delivering a speech about making angels and owning the stars, holding a scalpel blade.

scenes.heading: INT. POLICE STATION. DAY.
scenes.summary: Luv crosses through a chaotic police station hall filled with criminals awaiting processing.

scenes.heading: INT. CORONER’S OFFICE. HALLWAY. DAY.
scenes.summary: Coco enters the coroner's office hallway.

scenes.heading: INT. MORGUE. DAY.
scenes.summary: Luv kills Coco by pulverizing his C6 vertebra with her fist after handing him a femur, then continues packing bones while he dies at her feet.

scenes.heading: INT. MORGUE. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Coco's body is zipped into a body bag while Joshi watches, knowing why it happened.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Joshi arrives unexpectedly at K's apartment, turns off Joi's projector, and tells K that Coco is dead and the bones are gone.
scenes.turningPointNote: The investigation is compromised and K's secret is now at risk of exposure

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Joshi drinks heavily in K's apartment and asks him about memories from before he worked for her, while K shares a childhood memory of hiding a wooden horse.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. RESUME SCENE.
scenes.summary: K finishes telling his childhood memory to Joshi, who comments on it before leaving and telling him to check back after visiting the DeNAbase.

scenes.heading: INT. DENABASE DATABANK. POLICE STATION. DAY.
scenes.summary: K accesses the DeNAbase databank system to search for children born on a specific date in 2021, but the system reports no data found for pre-blackout information.

scenes.heading: INT. DENABASE DATABANK. POLICE STATION. CONTINUOUS.
scenes.summary: K works with a tech to search through massive genetic data while taking pills for his headache, and Joi appears to watch the dataflow with fascination.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. DAY.
scenes.summary: K's spinner emerges from fog and flies south over Los Angeles toward the outer ring where the city thins near a massive sea wall.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: Joi looks out at the rain-streaked city lights while K flies over ruined highway structures and a giant advertisement for Joi plays on an ad spire.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES. SAN DIEGO COASTLINE. DAY.
scenes.summary: K's spinner flies over the barren San Diego coastline toward strange flattened hillocks under storm clouds.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: Joi looks out at mountains of trash piled atop ruined buildings while K flies the spinner.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: Scavenger bedouins swarm over massive trash mesas to collect refuse deposited by aerial tractors.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: The spinner rattles from lightning as K flies over ship wrecks, then gunfire from the mesa hits the spinner.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: Someone below shoots at K's spinner from the trash mesa, with bullets hitting harmlessly against the glass.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: K flies over a large overturned freighter while being shot at from below.

scenes.heading: EXT. FREIGHTER DECK.
scenes.summary: The scavenger leader aims and tracks K's spinner with a makeshift long-range gun from the freighter deck.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: A metal bolt punctures the spinner's rear quarterpanel, shot from the mesa by the scavenger.

scenes.heading: EXT. FREIGHTER DECK.
scenes.summary: The scavenger watches and waits from the freighter deck.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: Lightning strikes the spinner through a kite and filament attached to the bolt, causing massive electrical discharge.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: The spinner's engines fail and it stalls in the air.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER. DAY.
scenes.summary: The spinner loses power, Joi disappears, and K struggles to control the crashing aircraft while grabbing the emanator.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: The spinner crashes into a valley of trash, leaving K unconscious and bloody inside the smoking wreckage.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: Joi projects from the fallen emanator and panics upon seeing K unconscious and possibly dead, repeatedly calling his name while flickering.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: Joi projects outside the spinner trying to wake K, but her system crashes and cuts out as scavengers close in on the downed aircraft.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: Scavengers begin grinding through the spinner door with a device, and the shrieking sound wakes K from unconsciousness.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: K emerges from the spinner and fights off multiple scavengers, shooting several while others back away, then looks up to see something in the sky.

scenes.heading: INT. LUV’S OFFICE. WALLACE TOWER. THAT MOMENT.
scenes.summary: Luv monitors K's fight through a drone while getting her nails painted, calmly giving firing commands and telling K to do his job.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA.
scenes.summary: Another drone shot blasts near K's spinner, and K realizes he's being followed as he activates a distress signal and walks toward a large satellite dish.

scenes.heading: EXT. THE DISH.
scenes.summary: K approaches a ramshackle door at the base of the overturned satellite dish.

scenes.heading: INT. CAVERNOUS HALL. DAY.
scenes.summary: K enters a burrow under the trash mountain that opens into a larger space.

scenes.heading: INT. “THE ORPHANAGE”.
scenes.summary: K discovers dozens of pale, deformed orphans eating in fearful silence who circle him with fascination, and one boy takes his hand to lead him through.

scenes.heading: INT. THE SORTING ROOM.
scenes.summary: K enters a factory where thousands of orphans sort through trash under the supervision of Mister Cotton, who shouts at the children.

scenes.heading: INT. THE SORTING ROOM.
scenes.summary: Cotton leads K through the working children while explaining his philosophy of caring for them through work, freezing them with a whistle when bottles spill.

scenes.heading: EXT. TRASH MESA. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: K pushes Cotton across a path through the trash toward a colossal tanker.

scenes.heading: INT. ABANDONED TANKER. THE ORPHANAGE.
scenes.summary: K grips Cotton's shoulder as they walk through the rusted maze of the abandoned tanker, and K experiences a strange feeling of familiarity.

scenes.heading: INT. COTTON’S PRIVATE QUARTERS. TANKER. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: Cotton searches his ledgers for records from the specific year K needs, but discovers the entire year's pages have been torn out.

scenes.heading: INT. ABANDONED TANKER. THE ORPHANAGE.
scenes.summary: K makes his way out of the tanker but stops at a place that caught his eye earlier and changes direction to go downstairs.

scenes.heading: INT. ANOTHER PASSAGEWAY. THE ORPHANAGE.
scenes.summary: K moves down a shadowy passage that feels oddly familiar to him.

scenes.heading: INT. BOILER ROOM. THE ORPHANAGE.
scenes.summary: K finds the boiler room from his memory, locates the secret hiding place behind a furnace, and discovers a small hand-carved wooden horse wrapped in a rag.
scenes.turningPointNote: K discovers physical proof that his implanted memory might be real, fundamentally challenging his understanding of his identity

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K and Joi examine the wooden horse in his apartment while Joi calls him special and suggests the name 'Jo,' but she flickers and appears damaged from seeing him nearly die.

scenes.heading: EXT. LAB BUILDING. DAY.
scenes.summary: K's spinner arrives at a building of striking architecture in front of the beautiful misty skyline.

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY. LAB BUILDING.
scenes.summary: K walks down a clean, sterile corridor in the lab building toward the right door.

scenes.heading: EXT. RAINFOREST/MEMORY LAB.
scenes.summary: A lush rainforest environment appears with rich vegetation and a beetle on a leaf that changes into different insects as if being selected from a menu.

scenes.heading: INT. MEMORY LAB. CONTINUOUS.
scenes.summary: K meets Dr. Ana Stelline in her memory lab, separated by glass due to her compromised immune system, and she examines his wooden horse, confirming the memory is real but impossible since memories aren't shared.
scenes.turningPointNote: Ana confirms K's memory is real, creating an impossible situation that deepens the mystery of his identity

scenes.heading: EXT. STREET. DAY.
scenes.summary: K steps out of Ana's building as snow begins to fall, taking a moment to feel that everything is possible, when a police spinner arrives to collect him on Joshi's orders.

scenes.heading: INT. INTERVIEW ROOM. DAY.
scenes.summary: K undergoes a baseline test in the interview room, appearing agitated and unable to keep still as he responds to the interviewer's prompts about cells and being interlinked.

scenes.heading: INT. JOSHI’S OFFICE. POLICE STATION. INTERCUT.
scenes.summary: Joshi watches K's feed carefully, sensing a change in him.

scenes.heading: INT. INTERVIEW ROOM.
scenes.summary: K undergoes a baseline test with repeated phrases but fails, being told he's not even close to baseline.

scenes.heading: INT. JOSHI’S OFFICE. POLICE STATION. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: K tells Joshi he found the child, describing how the replicant was hidden in plain sight with fake memories, but his response is cut off.
scenes.turningPointNote: K reveals he found the child, fundamentally changing the investigation

scenes.heading: EXT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K arrives at his apartment building, rushing and paranoid, noticing a female silhouette following him.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K tells Joi she was right about everything while she expresses wanting to be real for him, discussing his specialness and her limitations.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: An advertisement spire displays a large Joi advertisement looking down at the city.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. MORNING.
scenes.summary: K wakes beside Mariette in bed, while she secretly plants a tracking device in his jacket and examines his wooden horse before Joi dismisses her.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT.
scenes.summary: Joi refuses to come with K when he says they'll be coming soon, insisting he delete her from the console and put her in the emanator.

scenes.heading: INT. LUV’S OFFICE. THAT MOMENT.
scenes.summary: Luv notices a particular point of interest in Los Angeles goes dark on her map and rises, displeased.

scenes.heading: INT. HALL. REFURB APARTMENT COMPLEX. DAY.
scenes.summary: Doc Badger examines K's wooden horse with a scanner, revealing it's real wood with radiation from something more volatile than a reactor.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S SPINNER / PILOTFISH POV
scenes.summary: K pilots a drone through red dust, surveying the abandoned Vegas skyline and its dark, empty megastructures.

scenes.heading: EXT. LAS VEGAS STREET. CITY OUTSKIRTS. AFTERNOON.
scenes.summary: K detects life signs in the ruins and decides to investigate on foot, walking toward the radioactive city despite warning signs.

scenes.heading: EXT. STATUARY COURTYARD. AFTERNOON.
scenes.summary: K walks through a courtyard of broken erotic statues when a bee lands on his arm, leaving him speechless.

scenes.heading: EXT. CASINO HOTEL.
scenes.summary: K crosses a dry, cracked fountain toward the casino hotel.

scenes.heading: INT. CASINO LOBBY. AFTERNOON.
scenes.summary: K enters the abandoned casino lobby, carefully stepping over hidden tripwires and hearing piano notes from deep inside.

scenes.heading: INT. CORRIDOR.
scenes.summary: K moves through the dark corridor following the echo of piano notes.

scenes.heading: INT. CASINO FLOOR.
scenes.summary: K passes through the gambling hall with its pyramid of empty bottles and dusty card tables, moving toward the piano sound.

scenes.heading: INT. CIRCULAR BAR.
scenes.summary: K finds a piano and a mangy dog, then Deckard emerges from the shadows pointing his blaster at K.
scenes.turningPointNote: K encounters Deckard, the key figure he's been searching for

scenes.heading: INT. CIRCULAR STAIRCASE.
scenes.summary: Deckard walks down the stairs with his gun, followed by the dog.

scenes.heading: INT. LOBBY.
scenes.summary: Deckard finds K has escaped, leaving only blood, and tracks his movements in the dust while the dog waits.

scenes.heading: INT. WIDE CORRIDOR.
scenes.summary: K triggers a tripwire that sets off four explosions in sequence as he flees from Deckard.

scenes.heading: INT. THEATRE ENTRANCE AREA.
scenes.summary: Deckard sees a door close by an old lounge with a sign for a show called 'The Homage.'

scenes.heading: INT. THEATRE ENTRANCE AREA.
scenes.summary: Deckard throws a switch in an electrical panel, powering up the ancient wiring.

scenes.heading: INT. “THE HOMAGE” LOUNGE AND THEATER.
scenes.summary: K hides in the theater as lights and music activate, revealing a holographic Elvis performance while Deckard stalks him with gunfire.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT COMPLEX STAIRS. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Luv searches the stairs of K's apartment complex.

scenes.heading: INT. K’S APARTMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Luv breaks into K's apartment, examining Sapper's glasses, K's book, and finding the broken emanator antenna.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Luv's spinner flies through the Los Angeles sky traffic.

scenes.heading: INT. POLICE STATION. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Luv enters the police station through the crowd.

scenes.heading: INT. JOSHI’S OFFICE. POLICE STATION. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Luv confronts Joshi about K's whereabouts, leading to Joshi's defiant refusal and apparent death as Luv searches for information.
scenes.turningPointNote: Joshi is killed by Luv, eliminating K's protection and escalating the stakes

scenes.heading: INT. BAR. PENTHOUSE FLOOR SUITE. DUSK.
scenes.summary: Deckard shows K his luxurious penthouse filled with priceless art, explaining how the dirty bomb ruined Vegas while offering whiskey.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE FLOOR SUITE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K turns on a holo jukebox and sees the horizon for the first time, noticing Rachael's photograph and wooden sculptures carved by the same hand as his horse.

scenes.heading: EXT. LAS VEGAS STRIP. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Luv's spinner and five dark spinners approach Vegas, deploying a pilotfish that locks onto the casino.

scenes.heading: INT. LUV’S SPINNER. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Luv sees the pilotfish's view of two bodies in Deckard's penthouse and chooses not to detonate, overriding the system's prompts.

scenes.heading: EXT. TERRACE. PENTHOUSE FLOOR SUITE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K lies on the terrace seeing a clear horizon for the first time while looking at the sunrise.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE FLOOR SUITE. DAWN.
scenes.summary: Joi explores the penthouse while the dog becomes agitated and an alarm sounds, leading Deckard to spot something in the sky.

scenes.heading: INT. STAIRWELL. MOMENTS LATER.
scenes.summary: Deckard runs downstairs.

scenes.heading: INT. CORRIDOR. FLOOR BELOW.
scenes.summary: Deckard runs down the corridor followed by his dog, with K pursuing and seeing Deckard slip through a door.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE SUITE. FLOOR BELOW.
scenes.summary: Deckard locks himself in and activates an ancient spinner as K explodes through the wall to reach him.

scenes.heading: INT. LUV’S SPINNER.
scenes.summary: Luv tracks Deckard's movement and gives the order to attack.

scenes.heading: EXT. PENTHOUSE. CASINO HOTEL.
scenes.summary: A missile engages and targets the open window of the penthouse.

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE SUITE. FLOOR BELOW.
scenes.summary: K shields Deckard from the explosion, gets severely injured, then fights off attackers before Luv defeats him and captures Deckard.
scenes.turningPointNote: Deckard is captured by Wallace Corporation, removing K's key ally and information source

scenes.heading: INT. PENTHOUSE SUITE. NIGHT. TIME PASSING.
scenes.summary: Night falls as K lies dying in the destroyed penthouse until someone drags him away.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K awakens fevered by a campfire in the desert, sensing a human presence before losing consciousness again.

scenes.heading: EXT. DESERT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K shivers with fever by the dying campfire as Mariette and others tend to him, watching embers float into the starry sky.

scenes.heading: INT. PRIVATE OFFICE. WALLACE TOWER. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: Deckard awakens in Wallace's private office where Wallace reveals a wrapped object and expresses his desire to understand Deckard.

scenes.heading: INT. ABANDONED BASEMENT. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K awakens in an abandoned basement with severe injuries, clutching a broken emanator shard, and meets Freysa who reveals herself by lifting her dark glasses.
scenes.turningPointNote: K encounters the replicant resistance and learns crucial information about his identity

scenes.heading: EXT. PEDESTRIAN RAMP. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: K stands beneath a massive Joi advertisement that recognizes and responds to him.

scenes.heading: EXT. WALLACE TOWER. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: A Wallace transport van lifts off followed by two dark spinners, then K's spinner follows after them.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. NIGHT.
scenes.summary: The transport convoy flies through fog and snow along the coastline toward the sea wall.

scenes.heading: EXT. ABOVE THE SEA WALL.
scenes.summary: The convoy cuts through thick fog above the stormy sea wall, staying low to the rough surface.

scenes.heading: INT. TRANSPORT VAN.
scenes.summary: Luv transports handcuffed Deckard when K's pilotfish attacks their convoy, destroying both escort spinners and killing the pilot.
scenes.turningPointNote: K launches his rescue mission, attacking Wallace's transport convoy

scenes.heading: EXT. SEPULVEDA SEA WALL.
scenes.summary: The damaged transport crashes and sits precariously at the base of the sea wall as violent waves bash over it.

scenes.heading: INT. TRANSPORT VAN.
scenes.summary: K shoots and kills the co-pilot, then fires at and hits Luv as she tries to get the transport airborne.

scenes.heading: EXT. SEPULVEDA SEA WALL.
scenes.summary: K and Luv fight hand-to-hand on the sea wall as savage waves batter them, with Luv landing a devastating kick to K's ribs.

scenes.heading: INT. TRANSPORT VAN.
scenes.summary: Water floods into the lurching transport as handcuffed Deckard struggles to free himself while a colossal wave tips the vehicle.

scenes.heading: EXT. SEPULVEDA SEA WALL.
scenes.summary: Luv stabs K in the gut with a hidden second knife, declaring herself the best one before diving toward the sinking transport.

scenes.heading: INT. TRANSPORT VAN.
scenes.summary: Deckard is trapped up to his neck in rising water, held down by his shackle.

scenes.heading: INT. UNDERWATER.
scenes.summary: Deckard submerges underwater and fights desperately but cannot pull himself free from his restraints.

scenes.heading: INT. TRANSPORT VAN.
scenes.summary: Luv surfaces to taunt the drowning Deckard when K rises behind her, grabs her throat, and holds her underwater as she fights back.

scenes.heading: INT. UNDERWATER.
scenes.summary: Luv thrashes wildly underwater in K's grip until her eye rolls back and she goes still, releasing a final air bubble.
scenes.turningPointNote: Luv dies, eliminating Wallace's primary enforcer

scenes.heading: INT. TRANSPORT VAN.
scenes.summary: K breaks Deckard's restraints and they escape the sinking transport, swimming to safety as waves crash them against the sea wall.

scenes.heading: EXT. SEA WALL BASE.
scenes.summary: K and Deckard catch their breath on the sea wall as the transport sinks, with K telling Deckard he's now free to meet his daughter.
scenes.turningPointNote: K reveals Deckard is free and can reunite with his daughter

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. DAWN.
scenes.summary: The Los Angeles cityscape appears under a blanket of clean snow at dawn.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOWY FIELD. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K and Deckard trudge through snowfall toward their destination, with K limping from his wounds.

scenes.heading: EXT. LAB BUILDING. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K gives Deckard the wooden horse and tells him to go meet Ana, while K watches him cross the snowy field with blood dripping from his wound.
scenes.turningPointNote: K delivers Deckard to his daughter, completing his mission

scenes.heading: INT. HALLWAY. LAB BUILDING.
scenes.summary: Deckard walks down the hallway and halts before entering the door as K's voice recites the baseline test.

scenes.heading: EXT. SKIES ABOVE LOS ANGELES. DAWN.
scenes.summary: The fog briefly recedes over Los Angeles to reveal true sky before clouds return as K continues reciting the baseline test.

scenes.heading: EXT. SNOWY FIELD. DAWN.
scenes.summary: K lies in the snowy field, barely audibly completing the baseline test as he looks up at the sky and dies.
scenes.turningPointNote: K dies, completing his character arc of sacrifice

scenes.heading: INT. MEMORY LAB.
scenes.summary: Deckard enters Ana's memory lab and watches her marvel at digital snowflakes before she turns to greet the stranger with an innocent smile as he presses his hand against the glass.
scenes.turningPointNote: Deckard finally meets his daughter Ana after decades of separation
